meta.title: Is the Golden (Iron) Dome for America plan actually possible?
meta.description:
Download War Thunder for FREE and get your bonus! ► Use my link — https://playwt.link/sandboxx. To download on IOS & Android use — https://wtm.game/sandboxx. Thanks to War Thunder for sponsoring the video!

-- Break --

On January 27, 2025, one week after taking office, President Trump issued an executive order entitled, “The Iron Dome for America,” outlining the new administration’s goal of fielding a next-generation air defense network meant to deter future conflict and, if necessary, defend the American mainland from a wide variety of airborne attacks, including nuclear cruise, ballistic, and hypersonic missiles. 

But is this plan actually feasible? Let's discuss.
